name: Fuel Stations
mission: Providing the necessary fuel to keep the city's infrastructure moving.
vision: A privatized fueling system where owners control the price of gas per gallon based on oil imports.

basic: Fuel stations must be actively restocked via tanker jobs.
advanced: Station vaults can be robbed; hire security if necessary.

roles.name: Station Owner
roles.desc: Manages gas prices and employee wages.
